creator: wytten@sctc.com
text:
I create the ATAPI boot disk using the CD-ROM without any
problems, the partitioning and the newfs of / seem to go
okay, but when the software is actually supposed to be
extracted from the CD-ROM every extraction fails.

Looking at the ALT-F2 console output, gunzip seemed to 
repeatedly complain about an empty file. (Not sure about the
exact error, this was late last night)

I'm confused as to how the CD-ROM could work well enough
to get me as far as I did, and then fail.
